rules.title: Suspicious PsExec Execution - Zeek
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding exclusion filter
rules.description: detects execution of psexec or paexec with renamed service name, this rule helps to filter out the noise if psexec is used for legit purposes or if attacker uses a different psexec client other than s

rules.title: Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder
rules.condition_summary: selection_target and (selection_other_tools or all of selection_cmd_* or all of selection_pwsh_*)
rules.description: Detects a copy command or a copy utility execution to or from an Admin share or remote

rules.title: CobaltStrike Service Installations - System
rules.condition_summary: selection_id and (selection1 or selection2 or selection3 or selection4)
rules.description: Detects known malicious service installs that appear in cases in which a Cobalt Strike beacon elevates privileges or lateral movement

rules.title: Metasploit Or Impacket Service Installation Via SMB PsExec
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding exclusion filter
rules.description: Detects usage of Metasploit SMB PsExec (exploit/windows/smb/psexec) and Impacket psexec.py by triggering on specific service installation
